overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game showing a food stall in a neon-lit night market. The camera circles around the stall capturing a vendor cooking, steam rising from grills, and the atmospheric surroundings with red paper lanterns and digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall with steam and neon lighting

events.description: customer in teal tank top and cap moves away from the counter and exits frame right
camera pans left to focus on the vendor cooking area at the grill

agents.ego_description: slowly circling around the food stall observing the cooking area and steam

notable_agents.action: customer in teal tank top and cap walking away from the stall toward the street

entered.detail: white countertop with wooden base and various cooking equipment
metal grill surface with steam rising from cooking food
futuristic cyan-lit display showing menu items and prices
red paper lanterns with glowing neon centers hanging from ceiling
thick steam rising from hot cooking surface creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view behind a customer at a cyberpunk food stall. As the customer moves away, the camera pans to reveal the cooking area where a vendor works. Steam rises from the grill under red neon lanterns, and a digital menu screen glows cyan in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: food preparation area with cooking grills and equipment

events.description: steam intensity increases from the cooking grill creating thicker atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: watching the vendor cook at the grill, moving around the side of the stall counter

notable_agents.action: vendor in teal shirt stirring and cooking food at the grill, occasionally adjusting items

entered.detail: large silver pot with lid sitting on the counter near the grill
stack of brown ceramic bowls on a wooden tray

segments.scene_description: The camera circles to the side of the stall focusing on the vendor actively cooking. Steam billows from the grill as the vendor stirs food. A metal cooking pot and stacked bowls sit on the counter, while neon lanterns provide ambient lighting above.

scene_state.functional_zone: food service counter with display case and condiments

events.description: vendor picks up red and white cup and takes a drink while continuing to work
vendor places cup down on the counter and resumes food preparation

agents.ego_description: circling to the front of the counter, observing the food display case and condiment bottles

notable_agents.action: vendor drinking from a cup and checking the food display case

entered.detail: heated glass display case with glowing red interior containing prepared food items
red and silver squeeze bottles lined up on the white countertop
tables and stools visible in the background market corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving to the front of the stall, the camera reveals a heated food display case with glowing red interior and condiment bottles lined on the counter. The vendor takes a sip from a cup while working. The background shows more of the market seating area with neon-lit corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: market stall with vendor using electronic device

events.description: vendor pulls out a glowing cyan electronic device and looks at the screen while leaning on counter

agents.ego_description: moving around the stall to observe the vendor's actions and the wider market environment

notable_agents.action: vendor looking at a glowing handheld device and interacting with it

entered.detail: futuristic handheld device with glowing cyan screen held by the vendor
bright neon signage visible in the distant market corridor

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the vendor pulls out a glowing electronic device and checks it while standing at the counter. The camera continues to circle, showing neon signs in the distant market corridor and providing a wider view of the cyberpunk market environment before returning to the front of the stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous circling motion around a cyberpunk food stall, moving from a close-up perspective of the cooking area to a wider view of the neon-lit market. It begins behind a departing customer, panning to reveal a vendor working amidst rising steam under red neon lanterns and a glowing cyan digital menu. As the camera glides to the side, the focus shifts to the vendor stirring food beside stacked bowls and metal pots, with the ambient red light intensifying. The scene then opens up to the front of the stall, showcasing a heated red display case and condiment bottles while the background expands to reveal neon-lit corridors and market seating. Finally, the camera continues its orbit as the vendor checks a glowing electronic device, capturing a broad view of the distant market signs before returning to the stall's storefront.
